expectations.text: Recommends AWS Auth as the preferred method for ECS (platform-native, zero-secret)
Uses correct CLI install URL (artifacts-cli.infisical.com, not dl.infisical.com)
expectations.evidence: Correct URL: False, Wrong URL: False

expectations.text: Shows 'infisical run' pattern for injecting secrets at container startup
Does not recommend deprecated Service Tokens for authentication
Explicitly warns against baking secrets into Docker images
Uses machine identity authentication (not API keys or service tokens)
expectations.evidence: Machine identity: False, Universal Auth: False
